variants.text: You're back. Again. I'm... going to be careful with what I tell you this time. There's a case. The timestamps don't agree with themselves.
You're back. There's a case — and I'd rather you trust the record on this one. A misfiled afternoon. The timestamps disagree.
You're back. There's a case waiting. A misfiled afternoon — the timestamps don't agree with themselves.

choices.text: Have we done this one before?

eden.text: Correction: prior iterations exist in the Archive. Maya's denial is a continuity-preservation behavior, not a falsehood.

n_eden.speaker: Eden
n_eden.text: More than one. Exact count is withheld to preserve your stability. This withholding is itself logged.

n2.speaker: Maya
n2.text: Reconstructing the memory now. Stay with what you feel is true.
